WebACLArn.description: The ARN of the WAF web ACL that you associated with the distribution tenant.

ETag.description: The current version of the distribution tenant.

WebACLArn.description: The ARN of the WAF web ACL that you associated with the distribution.

ETag.description: The current version of the distribution.

Distribution.description: A distribution tells CloudFront where you want content to be delivered from, and the details about how to track and manage content delivery.

Location.description: The URL of the staging distribution.

ETag.description: The version identifier for the current version of the staging distribution.

AnycastIpList.description: A response structure that includes the version identifier (ETag) and the created AnycastIpList structure.

ETag.description: The version identifier for the current version of the Anycast static IP list.

Location.description: The fully qualified URI of the cache policy just created.

ETag.description: The current version of the cache policy.

Location.description: The fully qualified URI of the new origin access identity just created.

ETag.description: The current version of the origin access identity created.

FieldLevelEncryption.description: Returned when you create a new field-level encryption configuration.

Location.description: The fully qualified URI of the new configuration resource just created.

ETag.description: The current version of the field level encryption configuration. For example: E2QWRUHAPOMQZL.

FieldLevelEncryptionProfile.description: Returned when you create a new field-level encryption profile.

Location.description: The fully qualified URI of the new profile resource just created.

ETag.description: The current version of the field level encryption profile. For example: E2QWRUHAPOMQZL.

FunctionSummary.description: Contains configuration information and metadata about a CloudFront function.

Location.description: The URL of the CloudFront function. Use the URL to manage the function with the CloudFront API.

ETag.description: The version identifier for the current version of the CloudFront function.

Location.description: The fully qualified URI of the distribution and invalidation batch request, including the Invalidation ID.
The location for the invalidation.

KeyGroup.description: The key group that was just created.

Location.description: The URL of the key group.

ETag.description: The identifier for this version of the key group.
The ETag in the resulting key value store.

Location.description: The location of the resulting key value store.

MonitoringSubscription.description: A monitoring subscription. This structure contains information about whether additional CloudWatch metrics are enabled for a given CloudFront distribution.

Location.description: The URL of the origin access control.

Location.description: The URL of the public key.

FunctionSummary.description: Contains configuration information and metadata about a CloudFront function.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudFront resource for which the policy was created.

TestResult.description: An object that represents the result of running the function with the provided event object.

AnycastIpList.description: An Anycast static IP list. For more information, see Request Anycast static IPs to use for allowlisting in the Amazon CloudFront Developer Guide.

ETag.description: The current version of the Anycast static IP list.
The current version of the cache policy.

Distribution.description: A distribution tells CloudFront where you want content to be delivered from, and the details about how to track and manage content delivery.

ETag.description: The current version of the primary distribution (after it's updated).
The current version of the target standard distribution or distribution tenant that was associated with the domain.

FieldLevelEncryption.description: Return the results of updating the configuration.

ETag.description: The value of the ETag header that you received when updating the configuration. For example: E2QWRUHAPOMQZL.

FieldLevelEncryptionProfile.description: Return the results of updating the profile.

ETag.description: The result of the field-level encryption profile request.
